description_long: This object is a modern computer monitor with a rectangular display framed by a medium-thick, light gray bezel and accented with a pink top section. The screen displays a grayscale medical ultrasound image, suggesting use in clinical or diagnostic environments. The monitor is supported by a robust, angular stand that provides stability and elevates the display. A power or data cable extends from the rear, indicating connectivity to other devices or power sources. The rear of the monitor features a prominent pink panel, adding a distinctive visual contrast to the otherwise neutral color scheme. No visible buttons, ports, or brand logos are present on the exterior surfaces.
description: A modern computer monitor with a gray and pink color scheme, displaying a medical ultrasound image and supported by a sturdy angular stand.
description_view_0: Front view showing the display screen with a grayscale ultrasound image, framed by a gray bezel and a pink accent at the top.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the monitor's slim profile, the angular stand, and the cable extending from the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the prominent pink rear panel, the cable connection, and the full structure of the stand.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the monitor's thickness, the stand's angular design, and the cable trailing from the back.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is medium-thick, light gray plastic with a distinctive pink accent at the top, featuring slightly rounded corners and a smooth, matte finish.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is an angular, two-legged pedestal made of gray plastic, providing stable support and a slight elevation to the monitor.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons or controls are visible on any side of the monitor.
